properties.title: Modern 2BR Apartment with City View
properties.description: Stunning 2-bedroom apartment in the heart of Kilimani. Features include modern finishes, spacious living area, fully fitted kitchen with granite countertops, and a private balcony with breathtaking city views. The building offers 24-hour security, backup generator, high-speed elevators, and a shared rooftop terrace. Walking distance to Junction Mall, supermarkets, and restaurants. Perfect for professionals or small families.

properties.title: Executive Studio Apartment
properties.description: Modern studio apartment in the vibrant Westlands area. Perfect for young professionals or students. The unit features an open-plan layout with a fully equipped kitchen, comfortable sleeping area, and a sleek bathroom with modern fixtures. The building amenities include a gym, swimming pool, and 24-hour concierge service. Located minutes from Sarit Centre, Westgate Mall, and numerous restaurants and nightlife options.

properties.title: Affordable Bedsitter in Kasarani
properties.description: Clean, secure bedsitter in a quiet Kasarani neighborhood. Ideal for students or individuals on a budget. The room is freshly painted with ceramic tiles, large windows for natural light, and has access to shared bathroom and kitchen facilities. The compound has reliable water supply, electricity with backup, and 24-hour security askari. Close to Kasarani Stadium, Mwiki market, and public transport.

properties.title: Spacious 3BR Family Home
properties.description: Beautiful family home in a quiet Lang'ata estate. This spacious property features 3 large bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, 2 bathrooms (1 ensuite), a separate living and dining area, and a well-appointed kitchen with ample storage. The property sits on a quarter-acre plot with a manicured garden, covered patio for outdoor entertaining, and secure parking for 2 cars. Close to Lang'ata Road, Nairobi National Park, and top schools.

properties.title: 1BR Cosy Apartment in South B
properties.description: Charming 1-bedroom apartment in the desirable South B neighborhood. The unit has been recently renovated with modern finishes, including a stylish kitchen with breakfast bar, cozy living area, and a comfortable bedroom with ample closet space. The complex offers secure parking, 24/7 CCTV surveillance, and a backup generator. Walking distance to South B Shopping Centre, restaurants, and easy access to Mombasa Road.

properties.title: Luxury Studio in Lavington
properties.description: Luxury studio apartment in an exclusive Lavington complex. This premium unit features high-end finishes, a fully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances, smart home technology, and access to world-class amenities. The building offers a swimming pool, fully equipped gym, sauna, and 24-hour concierge service. Perfect for executives or professionals seeking a luxurious lifestyle in a prime Nairobi location.

properties.title: Garden View 2BR in Karen
properties.description: Elegant 2-bedroom apartment in the prestigious Karen area. Overlooking beautifully landscaped gardens, this ground-floor unit offers a serene living environment. The apartment features an open-plan living and dining area that flows onto a private patio, perfect for outdoor dining. Both bedrooms are generously sized with ensuite bathrooms and ample storage. The complex includes a clubhouse, tennis court, and children's play area.

properties.title: Budget Bedsitter in Eastleigh
properties.description: Affordable bedsitter in the bustling Eastleigh business district. Perfect for students or individuals on a tight budget. The room is clean and well-maintained with access to shared amenities. The location is ideal for those working or studying in Eastleigh, with close proximity to shopping centers, restaurants, and public transportation. Great value for money in a prime location.

properties.title: 1BR Kileleshwa Gem
properties.description: Charming 1-bedroom apartment in the leafy suburb of Kileleshwa. This well-maintained unit features a bright living area, modern kitchen with granite countertops, and a comfortable bedroom with built-in wardrobes. The building is secure with CCTV and askari, and offers reliable utilities including backup generator and borehole water. Located near shopping centers, restaurants, and with easy access to the CBD.

properties.title: 3BR Townhouse in Parklands
properties.description: Spacious townhouse in a quiet Parklands cul-de-sac. This two-story home features 3 bedrooms (master ensuite), a large living area, separate dining room, and a well-appointed kitchen. The property includes a private courtyard, roof terrace, and covered parking for 2 cars. The gated community offers 24-hour security and a children's play area. Ideal for families seeking space and tranquility close to the city.

properties.title: Modern 2BR with Balcony - Kilimani
properties.description: Contemporary 2-bedroom apartment with a spacious balcony overlooking the Kilimani skyline. The unit features modern interiors, high-end finishes, and premium appliances. The open-plan living area is perfect for entertaining, while the bedrooms offer peaceful retreats with comfortable finishes. The building includes a rooftop lounge, gym, and 24-hour concierge.

properties.title: Studio Apartment - Westlands
properties.description: Compact and efficient studio apartment perfect for professionals. Located in the heart of Westlands, this unit offers everything you need in a stylish package. The open-plan design maximizes space, with clever storage solutions and modern furnishings. The building features a ground-floor cafe, co-working space, and 24-hour security.

properties.title: 2BR Apartment near Southfield Mall
properties.description: Spacious 2-bedroom apartment in the well-planned South C estate. The unit offers generous living spaces, a functional kitchen, and two bathrooms. Located close to Southfield Mall, this apartment is ideal for families seeking convenience and a established neighborhood. The compound has children's play areas and community gardens.

properties.title: 3BR Maisonette in Lavington
properties.description: Elegant 3-bedroom maisonette in a prime Lavington location. This spacious home features a large living room, separate dining area, and a modern kitchen with island. All bedrooms are generously sized with built-in wardrobes, and the master suite includes a walk-in closet and ensuite bathroom. Outside, a landscaped garden and covered patio provide space for outdoor entertaining.

properties.title: 1BR Fully Furnished - Kileleshwa
properties.description: Beautifully furnished 1-bedroom apartment in Kileleshwa. Move-in ready with quality furniture and appliances throughout. The unit features a comfortable living area, modern kitchen, and a serene bedroom with queen-sized bed. The building offers reliable utilities and a responsive management team.

properties.title: Bedsitter in Kasarani - Near Mwiki
properties.description: Clean and affordable bedsitter near Mwiki in Kasarani. Perfect for students or young professionals on a budget. The room receives good natural light and has access to shared facilities. The location is convenient with easy access to Kenyatta University and local amenities.

properties.title: 2BR with Garden - Karen
properties.description: Ground-floor apartment with private garden access in Karen. This spacious 2-bedroom unit offers direct access to a lovely garden, perfect for pet owners or those who love outdoor space. The interior is well-designed with large windows that bring in plenty of natural light. The complex has a peaceful, resort-like atmosphere.

properties.title: Studio near Strathmore - South C
properties.description: Compact studio apartment perfect for a student or single professional. Located close to Strathmore University, this unit offers convenience and affordability. The room is clean and well-maintained with basic amenities included. Ideal for those who want to be close to campus without breaking the bank.

properties.title: 3BR Executive Apartment - Westlands
properties.description: Luxurious 3-bedroom executive apartment in the heart of Westlands. This premium unit offers the ultimate in urban living with high-end finishes, smart home technology, and breathtaking city views from the 20th floor. The building features a rooftop infinity pool, gym, spa, and 24-hour butler service. Perfect for CEOs, diplomats, or executives seeking the finest living experience.

properties.title: Bedsitter in South B - Near Shopping Centre
properties.description: Budget-friendly bedsitter in South B, just a short walk from the main shopping center. The room is clean and secure, with access to shared amenities. The neighborhood is well-established with good transport links and plenty of local shops. Great value for money in a convenient location.

properties.title: 1BR with Parking - Parklands
properties.description: Well-maintained 1-bedroom apartment in Parklands with dedicated parking. The unit features a spacious living area, functional kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with built-in wardrobe. The compound is clean and secure, with responsive management. Located near shops and restaurants.

properties.title: 2BR Apartment near T-Mall - Kasarani
properties.description: Spacious 2-bedroom apartment in Kasarani, just a short distance from T-Mall. The unit offers good space, with a comfortable living area and functional kitchen. The bedrooms are decently sized with built-in wardrobes. The compound has secure parking and reliable utilities. Good family home in a growing neighborhood.

properties.title: Studio in Kilimani - Near Junction Mall
properties.description: Modern studio apartment in Kilimani, walking distance to Junction Mall. The unit is fully furnished with contemporary pieces and includes all utilities in the rent. Perfect for a professional who wants a hassle-free living experience. The building has a gym and rooftop lounge.

properties.title: 3BR House with Garden - Lang'ata
properties.description: Charming 3-bedroom house in Lang'ata with a lovely garden. The property offers generous living spaces, a separate dining area, and a kitchen with ample storage. The garden is well-maintained and provides space for children to play. Located in a quiet neighborhood close to schools and shopping.

properties.title: Bedsitter in Eastleigh - Near 1st Avenue
properties.description: Very affordable bedsitter in Eastleigh near the busy 1st Avenue. Perfect for individuals on a tight budget. The room is basic but clean and secure. The location is unbeatable for those who work or study in Eastleigh, with everything within walking distance.

properties.title: 2BR with Balcony - Kileleshwa
properties.description: Lovely 2-bedroom apartment in Kileleshwa with a private balcony. The unit offers good cross-ventilation and natural light throughout. Both bedrooms are well-sized with built-in wardrobes. The kitchen is functional with space for appliances. The compound has good security and reliable utilities.

properties.title: Studio Apartment - Lavington
properties.description: Elegant studio apartment in a boutique building in Lavington. The unit has been beautifully designed with high-end finishes and furniture. Every detail has been considered, from the lighting to the storage solutions. The building has a small gym and rooftop terrace with city views.

properties.title: 1BR in South C - Near Airport
properties.description: Practical 1-bedroom apartment in South C, convenient for airport access. The unit is well-maintained with good space. The living area is comfortable, and the bedroom is quiet. The compound has secure parking and reliable security. Good option for frequent travelers or airport workers.

properties.title: Bedsitter in Kasarani - Clay City
properties.description: Budget bedsitter in Clay City area of Kasarani. The room is basic but clean and secure. The area is developing fast with new amenities coming up. Close to Kenyatta University and T-Mall. Good option for students or those on a tight budget.

properties.title: 2BR Apartment with Balcony - Westlands
properties.description: Stunning 2-bedroom apartment in a prime Westlands location with a spacious balcony. The unit is fully furnished with modern, high-quality furniture. The open-plan living area flows onto the balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The building has excellent amenities including a gym and pool.

properties.title: 1BR Garden Apartment - Karen
properties.description: Charming 1-bedroom garden apartment in Karen. This ground-floor unit offers direct access to a private garden, perfect for those who love outdoor space. The interior is bright and airy with large windows. The kitchen has been recently updated. The complex is peaceful and secure.

properties.title: Bedsitter in Kileleshwa - Near Strathmore
properties.description: Affordable bedsitter in Kileleshwa, walking distance to Strathmore University. The room is clean and well-maintained with good natural light. Shared facilities are kept clean. The location is ideal for students who want to be close to campus without paying high rents.

properties.title: 3BR Townhouse - South B
properties.description: Spacious 3-bedroom townhouse in a quiet South B cul-de-sac. The home features a generous living area, separate dining space, and a kitchen with ample storage. Upstairs, the bedrooms are comfortable with built-in wardrobes. Small backyard for children or pets. Good family home.

properties.title: Studio in Kilimani - Near Yaya
properties.description: Compact studio apartment in Kilimani, just a short walk from Yaya Centre. The unit is well-designed to maximize space and is fully furnished. Everything you need is provided, from cookware to linens. The building has a small gym and co-working space. Ideal for a professional.

properties.title: 2BR in Lang'ata - Near Nairobi National Park
properties.description: Nice 2-bedroom apartment in Lang'ata, close to Nairobi National Park. The unit offers good space with a comfortable living area and functional kitchen. The bedrooms are decently sized with built-in wardrobes. The compound has good security and is well-maintained.

properties.title: Bedsitter in Parklands - Near Hospital
properties.description: Affordable bedsitter in Parklands, close to MP Shah Hospital. The room is clean and secure, with access to shared facilities. The location is convenient for hospital workers or students. The neighborhood has all amenities within walking distance.

properties.title: 1BR Furnished - Westlands
properties.description: Beautifully furnished 1-bedroom apartment in Westlands. Move-in ready with high-quality furniture and appliances. The unit has a modern design with thoughtful touches throughout. The building has excellent amenities including a pool and gym. Perfect for a professional seeking a premium living experience.

properties.title: 3BR House - Kileleshwa
properties.description: Spacious 3-bedroom house in Kileleshwa on a good plot. The property offers generous living spaces, a large kitchen, and three good-sized bedrooms. Outside, there's a garden and covered patio. The house has been well-maintained and is ready for a family. Located in a quiet street.

properties.title: Studio - South B Near Mombasa Road
properties.description: Compact studio apartment in South B, convenient for access to Mombasa Road. The unit is clean and well-maintained, with basic amenities included. The building has good security and is well-managed. Ideal for a single person who needs easy access to the highway.

properties.title: 2BR with Parking - Kilimani
properties.description: Practical 2-bedroom apartment in Kilimani with dedicated parking. The unit offers good living space, a functional kitchen, and two comfortable bedrooms. The compound has good security and reliable utilities. Good value for money in a prime location.

properties.title: Bedsitter - Lang'ata Near Otiende
properties.description: Affordable bedsitter in Lang'ata near Otiende area. The room is clean and secure, with access to shared amenities. The neighborhood is established with good access to shops and transport. Good option for those on a budget.

properties.title: 1BR Garden Apartment - Lavington
properties.description: Ground-floor apartment in Lavington with a private garden. The unit has a lovely flow, with the living area opening onto the garden. The bedroom is quiet and comfortable with good storage. The kitchen is functional. The complex is well-maintained with good security.

properties.title: Studio in Westlands - Near Sarit
properties.description: Modern studio apartment in Westlands, walking distance to Sarit Centre. The unit is fully furnished with contemporary pieces. The open-plan layout makes the most of the space. The building has a gym and rooftop lounge. Great for a professional who wants to be in the heart of Westlands.

properties.title: 3BR Apartment - South C
properties.description: Spacious 3-bedroom apartment in a well-established South C block. The unit offers good living space, a functional kitchen, and three bedrooms with built-in wardrobes. The building has good security and reliable utilities. Good family home in a convenient location.

properties.title: Bedsitter - Kasarani Near KU
properties.description: Popular bedsitter near Kenyatta University, always in high demand. The room is clean and secure, with access to shared facilities. The location is ideal for students, with the university within walking distance. The landlord is responsive and maintains the property well.

properties.title: 1BR in Parklands - Near Hospital
properties.description: Good-sized 1-bedroom apartment in Parklands, close to Aga Khan Hospital. The unit offers a comfortable living area, functional kitchen, and a good-sized bedroom with built-in wardrobe. The compound has secure parking and good security. Convenient for hospital workers.

properties.title: 2BR with Pool - Kilimani
properties.description: Luxury 2-bedroom apartment in Kilimani with swimming pool access. The unit is tastefully furnished and well-appointed. The living area is spacious, and both bedrooms are comfortable with good storage. The building has a pool, gym, and 24-hour security. Premium living in a prime location.

properties.title: Bedsitter - Eastleigh Near Mosque
properties.description: Very affordable bedsitter in Eastleigh, close to the main mosque. The room is basic but clean and secure. The location is convenient for those who work or study in Eastleigh. Great value for money in a busy neighborhood.

properties.title: 3BR House - Karen Near The Hub
properties.description: Beautiful 3-bedroom house in Karen, close to The Hub shopping center. The property has been recently renovated and features modern finishes throughout. The open-plan living area flows onto a covered patio overlooking the garden. The kitchen is modern with granite countertops. All bedrooms are generous with built-in wardrobes. Prime Karen living.

properties.title: Studio - Lavington Near Strathmore
properties.description: Convenient studio apartment in Lavington, close to Strathmore University. The unit is fully furnished and well-maintained. The open-plan layout is efficient and comfortable. The building has good security and a responsive landlord. Ideal for a student or young professional.
